---
title: "Undergraduate Research - Importance, Benefits, and Challenges"
description: "CHIRAL Bangladesh"
date: "2022-08-08"
categories: [Research, Career, Higher Studies]
---

![](featured.png)

The Undergraduate Research Training Program(URTP) provides intermediate-level biomedical research training for undergraduates in a supportive environment with supplement educational activities. Furthermore, this course is designed to enhance the undergraduate research experience by focusing on critical communication skills for success in research and broadly transferable professional skills. Students will become part of a community of scholars in health sciences. The course is suitable for students beginning the first semester of undergraduate studies and completing their second or
